parameters.name: run_command
parameters.description: Execute a shell command on the Open Terminal host and return stdout/stderr and the exit code. Polls until the command finishes (up to ~timeout seconds). Parameters: command (required, e.g. 'ls -la' or 'cd /tmp && ./build.sh'), cwd (optional working directory), timeout (optional max seconds to wait, default 60, max 180), confirm (set 'true' to run a command that was flagged as potentially destructive).

value.command: ={{ $fromAI('command', 'The shell command to execute, e.g. ls -la', 'string') }}
value.cwd: ={{ $fromAI('cwd', 'Working directory, or empty string for the default', 'string') }}
value.timeout: ={{ $fromAI('timeout', 'Max seconds to wait for completion (default 60), or empty string', 'string') }}
value.confirm: ={{ $fromAI('confirm', 'Set to true only to confirm a previously flagged destructive command, otherwise empty string', 'string') }}

schema.description: true to confirm destructive command, else empty

parameters.name: send_input
parameters.description: Send text to the stdin of a still-running process (started by run_command). Use for interactive prompts, sudo passwords, or 2FA / confirmation codes. Parameters: process_id (required, from a run_command that is still running), text (required, the text to send; use \n for Enter, \x03 for Ctrl-C).

value.process_id: ={{ $fromAI('process_id', 'The process_id returned by a still-running run_command', 'string') }}
value.text: ={{ $fromAI('text', 'Text to send to stdin, include \n for Enter', 'string') }}

schema.description: Process id of the running command

parameters.name: read_file
parameters.description: Read a text file from the Open Terminal host. Parameters: path (required, absolute or relative), start_line (optional, 1-indexed), end_line (optional, 1-indexed).

parameters.name: write_file
parameters.description: Write text content to a file on the Open Terminal host (creates parent directories, overwrites if it exists). Parameters: path (required), content (required, the full text to write).

value.content: ={{ $fromAI('content', 'Full text content to write to the file', 'string') }}

parameters.name: list_files
parameters.description: List files and directories at a path on the Open Terminal host. Parameter: directory (optional, defaults to current directory '.').

value.directory: ={{ $fromAI('directory', 'Directory to list, or empty string for current directory', 'string') }}

parameters.name: check_terminal
parameters.description: Check that the Open Terminal instance is reachable and report which features (terminal, notebooks, system prompt) are enabled. No parameters.
